channel.title: SPL - NewHolly Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - NewHolly Branch

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play and Learn / Ku ciyaarista iyo barashada qalabka Kaleidoscope-ka
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time.---------------------------------------------------------------Carruurtu waxay dhegaystaan sheekooyinka luqadaha badan, waxay ku heesaan heeso waxayna la sameeyaan farshaxanka iyo farsamooyinka gacanta ee fudud daryeelayaashooda inta lagu jiro wakhtiga kooxda.

Event details

item.title: Game On for Kids! Role-playing game (RPG)
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Join us to play Imagination Quest, a role-playing adventure game.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Trained tax preparers will set up laptops and help taxpayers do their own taxes.

Event details

item.title: Brick Buddies
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Young children and their families are invited to join our drop-in play group with Lego bricks, Picasso tiles, and other building sets.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play and Learn / Ku ciyaarista iyo barashada qalabka Kaleidoscope-ka
item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time.---------------------------------------------------------------Carruurtu waxay dhegaystaan sheekooyinka luqadaha badan, waxay ku heesaan heeso waxayna la sameeyaan farshaxanka iyo farsamooyinka gacanta ee fudud daryeelayaashooda inta lagu jiro wakhtiga kooxda.

Event details

item.description:
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: NewHolly Branch, Meeting Room

Trained tax preparers will set up laptops and help taxpayers do their own taxes.
